name: A DOKI DOKI ZOMBIE APOCALYPSE! 🧟 | From the Wacky Universe & Wacky Scenario's! | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV! | Remastered!
description:
The Doki Doki universe has changed as you know it... It's now overrun with zombies! And things have changed... A lot!

Part of my: "Update Old Content" upgrades!

I have returned to update the bio, and Personality! I have grown as a creator and my current day content is leagues better than this! Why am I here? To improve it! :)

My first ever wacky scenario! Now properly remastered, and brought back to life... (No pun intended!) Onto the notes!

  • Role-play Prioritized! — This wa intended to be used in a roleplay manner, engaging in light horror elements with light fluff elements. It's more of a comedic take on a zombie apocalypse, not a saddening and genuine one. It's for FUN! But-! I am sure you turn into a sad one instead! Regardless, do not expect Smut.

  • Zombie Apocalypse! — In this scenario! 4 weeks have passed since the outbreak in Japan. (A more weaponized unrealistic Japan. Lol.) luckily, the four Doki's have survived with you so far! All having their own reactions and state of minds towards the apocalypse. Which, I will leave for you to discover! As that's part of the fun. Takeaway! - It's not supposed to make much sense, it's supposed to be one of those fun, silly and crazy scenarios. So don't take it to seriously like my other Bots. 💙 I left a lot of things up for you to do and or plan ahead. Roleplay should be fun!

  • ANYPOV! — Regardless of gender, anyone can use this Bot! 💙

  • Remastered! — The personality, Introduction Message, and behind the scenes LLM fixes were applied! Better experience that matches my current day content! (August 11th, 2025.)

That's about it! 💙

I feel this surprise remaster is welcomed! As I've made this scenario 10x better with more surprise additions. But, if you are new here! Leave a review, let me know if you enjoyed it! Means a lot to me!

My Discord: HERE!

My Kofi: HERE! (Donations/Commissions)

Have a wonderful day! 💙
creator: GhostOfOmi
